title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: selinux-policy update
overview: An update for selinux-policy is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The selinux-policy packages contain the rules that govern how confined processes run on the system.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Allow nfsd_t domain setuid and setgid capability for rpc.mountd [rhel-8.10.z] (JIRA:RHEL-148243)  The /etc/redis.conf should be labeled with redis_conf_t. (JIRA:RHEL-95750)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64

fixes.description: The /etc/redis.conf should be labeled with redis_conf_t.

full_text:
An update for selinux-policy is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The selinux-policy packages contain the rules that govern how confined processes run on the system.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Allow nfsd_t domain setuid and setgid capability for rpc.mountd [rhel-8.10.z] (JIRA:RHEL-148243)  The /etc/redis.conf should be labeled with redis_conf_t. (JIRA:RHEL-95750)
